title: LR-130
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: O Lord, hear my voice, for I have called to you; Be my help! Do not abandon or forsaken me! O God, my Savior!

title: Psalm 100: 1-2, 3, 5
author: Sarah Hart
snippet: We are his people, We are his people, the sheep of his flock.

title: Mark 1:15
author: Steve Angrisano
snippet: The kingdom of God is at hand. Repent and believe in the Gospel.

title: The Summons
author: KELVINGROVE
snippet: Will you come and follow me If I but call your name? Will you go where you don’t know And never be the same? Will you let my love be shown, Will you let my name be known, Will you let my life be grown In you and you in me?

title: LR-131
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: There is one thing I ask of the Lord, only this do I seek; to live in the house of the Lord all the days of my life.

title: Ubi Caritas
author: Bob Hurd
snippet: Ubi caritas est vera, est vera: Deus ibi est, Deus ibi est.

title: Here I am to worship
author: Tim Hughes
snippet: Light of the world, you stepped down into darkness Open my eyes, let me see. Beauty that made this heart adore you, Hope of a life spent with you.

title: Great Will Be The Future
author: Chris Muglia/David Brinker
snippet: We stand in faith declaring aloud the majesty of God, His mighty power. Together we witness to all that He's done, and all that He's promised to bring. Together we lift up our voices as one, Together we sing.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
